response.original_title: Why Can’t I Withdraw Money from Robinhood After Selling? (: 1-863-338-2360)
response.overview: If you recently sold stocks on Robinhood and can’t withdraw your money, it’s usually due to settlement and transfer rules (: 1-863-338-2360)  Even after a sale, your cash may not be immediately available for withdrawal (: 1-863-338-2360)  Robinhood follows standard financial clearing timelines before funds can be moved (: 1-863-338-2360)  1. Your Funds Are Still in Settlement (: 1-863-338-2360)  After selling stocks, the trade must “settle” before withdrawal (: 1-863-338-2360)  Stock trades typically take 1–2 business days (T+2 rule) to settle (: 1-863-338-2360)  During this time, your balance may show but is not withdrawable (: 1-863-338-2360)
response.title: Why Can’t I Withdraw Money from Robinhood After Selling? (: 1-863-338-2360)
